title: Law School Admission Council Investigation Executive Summary
summary: A complainant objected to the requirement that students enrolled at Canadian universities be fingerprinted in order to write the Law School Admission Test (LSAT). The test’s creator, the Law School Admission Council (LSAC), is a non-profit corporation physically located in the United States and founded to coordinate, facilitate and enhanc...
